title: ADA Design and Analysis Extension
description: GLTF extension for design and analysis objects

version.description: Version of the ADA GLTF extension schema

assembly_guid.description: Stable lineage anchor: the source Assembly's guid. CAD and FEA exports derived from the same Assembly share this value so a viewer can match them without name lookups.

component_info.description: Present when the GLB represents a single Connection component built from a registered ConnectionSpec. Lets the viewer show the spec lineage and bind re-build UI back to the source registry.

type.description: Component category. Today only 'connection'; future component kinds (bolted joints, stiffener assemblies, ...) will use their own tags.

spec_name.description: Registered ConnectionSpec name this component was built from.

spec_inputs.description: Inputs (sections, angles, ...) the spec was evaluated with — the same dict shape build_component accepts.

member_groups.description: Optional map of role name (e.g. 'incoming', 'landing') to member node names — lets the viewer highlight individual roles.
